hero.tagline: Specialized in Hemodialysis Technology & Innovative Healthcare Solutions

about.title: About Me
about.p1: I am a dedicated Biomedical Engineer specializing in <1>Hemodialysis Technology</1>. With expertise in both hardware and software, I bridge the gap between biological systems and engineering principles.
about.p2: As a freelancer, I provide technical support, maintenance, and innovative solutions for renal care facilities. My focus is on ensuring the reliability and efficiency of life-saving medical equipment.

equipment.title: Medical Equipment Showcase
equipment.subtitle: Specialized expertise in hemodialysis technology and medical equipment
equipment.preventive_maintenance_desc: Regular maintenance schedules to ensure optimal performance and patient safety
equipment.technical_support_desc: 24/7 technical assistance and troubleshooting for equipment issues
equipment.calibration_desc: Precise calibration and performance testing according to medical standards
equipment.training_desc: Comprehensive training for medical staff on equipment operation and safety

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Interested in collaborating on a project? Feel free to reach out.
